body.title: Make pe_chain max_rounds a first-class monitored budget with logging and alert
body.result: pe_chain removed entirely 2026-05-23 — ticket made obsolete by D-remove-pe_chain
body.description:
pe_chain has a retry limit but round consumption is invisible until exhaustion — a silent failure mode. Promote to first-class: log round consumption at each step (round N/max_rounds in basket telemetry), emit cc_inbox entry when >=80% of budget consumed mid-sprint so Akien can intervene, include round_count in pe_chain close telemetry. Goal: detectable signal with time to intervene, not a post-mortem discovery.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/coding
**Scope boundary:** In scope: round-consumption logging, 80%-consumed cc_inbox alert, close telemetry. Out of scope: changing the retry limit value, changing escalation behavior.
**Test plan:** Set max_rounds=3, run a ticket requiring 3 rounds; verify cc_inbox receives alert at round 2 (80%); verify close telemetry contains round_count=3.
